```{=html}
<div class="page-header">
  <h1 data-i18n="page-header-resources">Resources</h1>
</div>

<div class="container section">
  <p style="font-size:1.05rem;" data-i18n="resources-intro">
    Below you'll find free, downloadable resources created by Cultural Health Connect to support healthier living in our community. All materials are available in English, Spanish, and Arabic.
  </p>

  <div class="resource-card">
    <div class="resource-info">
      <h3 data-i18n="pamphlet-title">Multilingual Health Pamphlet</h3>
      <p data-i18n="pamphlet-desc">Our community health pamphlet covering chronic disease prevention, culturally adapted dietary guidance, and lifestyle tips.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="pdf-viewer-wrap">
    <iframe
      src="MultiLingual%20Cultural%20Health%20Connect.pdf"
      class="pdf-viewer"
      title="Multilingual Health Pamphlet">
      <p>Your browser doesn't support embedded PDFs.
        <a href="MultiLingual%20Cultural%20Health%20Connect.pdf" target="_blank">Click here to view the PDF.</a>
      </p>
    </iframe>
  </div>
</div>

<footer>
  <span data-i18n="footer-short">© 2025 Cultural Health Connect</span>
</footer>
```
